package.name: WebGateway
package.descr: Complete Squid 7 outbound web security gateway with explicit and transparent IPv4/IPv6 listeners, tunnel/selective/full TLS modes, native policies and feeds, identity providers, caching and shaping, parent proxies, ICAP, optional local antivirus, PF safety controls, transactional rollback, live status, and diagnostics. HTTPS remains tunnel-only by default.
